name: fde
description: FDE skills for customer discovery, pain-point analysis, business workflow decomposition, and MVP scoping.

interface.shortDescription: 客户访谈、痛点洞察与 MVP 收敛
interface.longDescription: FDE Skills helps agents prepare customer discovery interviews, analyze customer conversations, identify real business pain points, decompose workflows, and scope practical MVP opportunities before proposing AI automation.
defaultPrompt: 用 FDE skill 帮我准备客户访谈问题。
分析这段客户原话，告诉我下一步怎么追问。
把这份访谈记录整理成痛点和 MVP 机会。
